arts.ttl: Player says he’s living Leeds United dream – Not defensive like Sheffield United and Burnley
arts.sum: Leeds United, Burnley and Sheffield United are in contention for direct promotion to the Premier League. Daniel Farke’s side are leading the Championship table with 66 points, five points ahead of Burnley and Sheffield United who are in second and third spot respectively. arts.ttl: 'Opportunity': Scott Parker drops selection hint for Burnley's FA Cup tie against Southampton
arts.sum: Scott Parker is expected to rotate his Burnley side for today’s FA Cup tie against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Southampton v Burnley: Team news, predicted teams and TV details for FA Cup fourth round tie
arts.sum: Burnley take a brief break from their Championship promotion charge when they face Premier League strugglers Southampton in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: 'Badges on our chest': Scott Parker peels the curtain behind Burnley's 'best defence in Europe'
arts.sum: Scott Parker believes the togetherness and team spirit among his Burnley squad is a major factor behind them boasting the best defensive record in Europe.

arts.ttl: Approach to Southampton for PL side’s new signing – Saints keen on sanctioning move
arts.sum: On winter deadline day, Southampton completed the signing of Victor Udoh from Royal Antwerp. The Saints confirmed the 20-year-old will initially be part of the English club’s U21 side. The forward arrived at Southampton after playing 300 minutes from 28 matches for the Belgian club’s senior team. arts.ttl: Scott Parker makes 'gutted' Burnley John Egan admission following Hull City deadline day move
arts.sum: Scott Parker has admitted he was “gutted” to lose John Egan during the final day of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Southampton keen on Scotland U21 international
arts.sum: Celtic and Southampton are among the clubs in the picture to sign Motherwell’s Lennon Miller, according to a report from Germany. On Thursday, claims from the UK stated Motherwell rejected Royale Union Saint-Gilloise’s bid for Miller in the winter market. arts.ttl: Burnley predicted team to face Southampton in the FA Cup as Scott Parker likely to ring changes - gallery
arts.sum: For the second time in as many weeks, Burnley make the long trip down to the South Coast this weekend.

arts.ttl: Burnley's James Trafford praised for near 'perfect' January after claiming player of the month award
arts.sum: James Trafford has been applauded for his near “perfect” month of displays after picking up the Championship’s player of the month award for January.
